title: Glowing ores
description: Transforms all 18 Minecraft ore blocks into brilliant glowing treasures with a 5-tier intensity system, realistic color temperatures, and dynamic pulsing animations.
body:
Ore Emissive Pack 

Transform your mining experience with scientifically-crafted luminescent ore effects!

Optifine Only

BSL Shaders highly recommended 

What This Pack Does

Ever wished Minecraft's ores actually glowed with realistic light? This pack makes all 18 ore blocks radiate beautiful, authentic light based on their real-world mineral properties. No more missing valuable ores in dark caves!

Screenshots

 

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/L5ZEu3zt/images/6faad2ecddd422e3a9a6988b479307dd0368f09a.png) ![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/L5ZEu3zt/images/1b0a6581fcbbb1e1b3814e07b79fa642748b1933.png) ![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/L5ZEu3zt/images/8f5becbea1fd0be1b1faf337afe32638aaa95148.png)

Experience the magic yourself - screenshots don't do justice to seeing these ores pulse and glow in real-time!

Installation Guide

  1. Download the resource pack
  2. Install OptiFine if you haven't already
  3. Place the pack in your resourcepacks folder
  4. Enable the pack in Minecraft settings
  5. Turn on "Emissive Textures" in OptiFine settings
  6. Start mining and watch the magic happen!

Version

v1.0 - Current

  • All 18 ore blocks with hyper-enhanced glow
  • Handheld item luminescence
  • Dynamic animation system
  • Scientific color accuracy
  • Performance optimizations
